title: Specialist impl declaration
description: Formal schema for a specialist impl provision per D19 (specialist kind). Specialists are packaged role/skill bundles loaded into a workspace's substrate via the `skills` capability (D17). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., supported-work-unit-kinds resolve to registered kinds; required adapter bindings exist in workspace) is out of scope per D28.

id.description: Stable specialist identifier (D19). Vocabulary-identifier per D34.

roles.description: Shape-role-tags this specialist operates in (D19), per D13's role vocabulary. Required slot; may be []. Items reference shape role-ids (vocabulary-identifier).

skills.description: Operations the specialist provides (D19). Semantic declarations only; formal interface and content (e.g., SKILL.md) = layer 3 / specialist-impl. Required slot; may be [].

publicly-exposed.description: Per D21 — exposure flag for workspace-as-A2A-peer / workspace-as-MCP-server scenarios.

supported-work-unit-kinds.description: Which work-unit-kinds this specialist is appropriate for (D19). Open vocabulary; values are extension-registered work-unit-kinds (fully-qualified per D29). Required slot; may be [].

required-adapter-bindings.description: Adapter provisions the specialist needs bound in the workspace (D19; resolved per D30 + D32 §1 satisfiability). Required slot; may be []. Items reference adapter provision ids by canonical fully-qualified form.

required-substrate-capabilities.description: Substrate capabilities the specialist needs (D19). Typically includes 'skills'. Required slot; may be [].

declared-event-emissions.description: Events the specialist produces (D19; parallel to adapter D16). Required slot; may = [].

declared-event-subscriptions.description: Events the specialist reacts to (D19). Required slot; may be [].

activation-scope.description: Optional scope conditions under which the specialist is active (D19; minimal grammar locked by D55 §B.1). Absent = always-active when bound. Either literal string "always" OR a single-field structured predicate {"when": {"payload-subtype": <value>}}.
